title: DeepSeek-R1: Incentivizing Reasoning Capability in Large Language Models via Reinforcement Learning

defines.name: DeepSeek-R1-Zero
defines.definition: An LLM trained with pure reinforcement learning on verifiable rewards to elicit emergent reasoning behaviors without supervised fine-tuning.

defines.name: DeepSeek-R1
defines.definition: A multi-stage reasoning model that combines reinforcement learning, rejection sampling, and supervised fine-tuning to improve reasoning while aligning behavior with human preferences.

problem: Existing reasoning methods rely heavily on human-annotated reasoning traces and supervised demonstrations, which limit scalability and constrain models to human-like reasoning paths.
